subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! These are servants who have turned their faces in sincerity toward Thy gracious Countenance, and have believed in and acknowledged Thy mighty Announcement [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد اخلصوا وجوههم بوجهک الکریم و آمنوا و صدقوا بنباک العظیم
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @power of prayer, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
